name: Clam Chowder (Red Lobster)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, combine the clam juice, milk powder, and flour. Blend until smooth.
2. Pour the mixture into a saucepan with a capacity of 2-1/2 quarts. Stir in the chicken broth, stirring constantly on medium-high heat until thick and smooth.
3. Reduce the heat to low. Add the celery, onion, clams, parsley, and potatoes. Continue cooking on low heat for up to an hour, seasoning with salt and pepper as desired.
4. The dish can be frozen for later use.
